start:
🌿 Agrivo SRE Assistant

Operational monitoring and DevOps guidance for the Agrivo agricultural marketplace.

Environment: {environment}
Language: English
Data mode: {data_mode}

Health: /status, /health, /doctor
AI assistance: /ask <question>
Preferences: /language en or /language az
Help: /help
help:
Agrivo SRE Assistant Commands

Health
/start - Open main menu
/status - Live platform overview
/health - Detailed component health
/doctor - Deterministic health score
/metrics - Prometheus metric summary
/chart [hours] - PNG metric chart (1-24 hours)
/alerts - Active Alertmanager alerts

Platform
/pods - Kubernetes pods
/deployments - Kubernetes deployments and images
/hpa - Autoscaling status
/grafana - Dashboard links
/argocd - Application sync and health
/images - Running container images

Delivery and analysis
/workflows - Latest GitHub Actions runs
/last_deploy - Latest successful workflow
/incident - Correlated read-only incident analysis
/daily_report - Daily platform report

AI and preferences
/ask <question> - Ask a DevOps question
/language az or /language en - Change language
mock_warning: ⚠️ Mock data: no live Agrivo, Prometheus, Grafana, Kubernetes, or Argo CD source was queried.
ai_unavailable:
AI assistant is currently unavailable because Gemini API is not configured.
You can still use /status, /health, /doctor and /help.
ai_temporary_failure: AI assistant is temporarily unavailable. Please use /status, /health, /doctor or try again later.
ask_too_long: The question is too long. Maximum length is {maximum} characters.
generic_error: The request could not be completed safely. Please try again.
